# Resume Website Project Instructions

This project is a modern resume website with editing capabilities using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and local storage for dynamic resume modification.

## Project Requirements
- Interactive resume website with live editing functionality
- Modern responsive design
- Local storage for saving changes
- Professional layout with sections for personal info, experience, education, skills
- Real-time preview of modifications
- Print-friendly styling

## Technology Stack
- HTML5 for structure
- CSS3 with modern features (Grid, Flexbox, animations)
- Vanilla JavaScript for interactivity
- Local Storage API for persistence
- Responsive design principles

## Key Features
- Editable resume sections
- Live preview while editing
- Save/load functionality
- Professional themes
- Export capabilities
- Mobile-responsive design

## Development Guidelines
- Use semantic HTML
- Implement clean, maintainable CSS
- Follow modern JavaScript best practices
- Ensure cross-browser compatibility
- Optimize for performance and accessibility
